grid_source: mk_test/t3/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า00_gridline.json
raw_text: ระดับหลังคาน +3.75, ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 +0.60, ระดับอ้างอิง ±0.00. เซาะร่อง หรือ ฝังเส้น PVC. กันสาด ค.ส.ล. Grid callouts along the bottom, left to right: D, C, B, A, with dimension chain 1.50 | 4.00 | 2.00 | 3.50 | 1.50, bracketed as 1.50 (left overhang) | 9.50 (gridD-gridA) | 1.50 (right, beyond gridA). A small hand-drawn roof-slope indicator (a right triangle labeled '9', partially stylized) is shown at the high end of the roof, left side of the sheet (near grid D).
description: Side elevation (รูปด้าน 2), running D-C-B-A left to right. Shows the visibly sloped monopitch roofline (high at the D/left end per the slope triangle, low toward A/right), a window opening (callout 1) plus a further opening (callout 3), a large diagonally cross-braced opening on the right side (the open-sided จอดรถ carport, drawn with corner braces instead of a solid wall), and a concrete canopy (กันสาด ค.ส.ล.) at the right end. Same level datum as รูปด้าน 1.
warnings: The roof pitch annotation is small stylized text; read as approximately '9' (degrees) but should be zoom-verified before treating as exact — same uncertainty t2 flagged.
Classified 'unknown' per schema guidance for elevations without schedule/quantity data.

The left (D-side) and right (A-side) 1.50 m overhang/extension figures on this sheet match the master grid file's dummy grid 'A'' position (9.5+1.5=11.0) on the A side, but this elevation only extends 1.50 m past grid A — it does NOT show a second 1.50 m segment out to 'A'' (12.5 m). See หน้า09_section2.json for the same observation from a full building cross-section, which supports treating 'A'' as a site/road-boundary reference rather than a built structural line.
Sibling view รูปด้าน 1 is in _หน้า07_elevation1.json.
Independent read done first, then cross-checked against t2's หน้า07_elevation2.json — same level datums, grid spans, and roof-slope reading; no disagreement.
